title: Semana Santa en Cartagena
venue: Iglesias y calles del Centro Historico
venue_name: Catedral de Santa Catalina de Alejandria
description: Semana Santa vivida con fervor en la ciudad amurallada. Procesiones solemnes por calles coloniales, Via Crucis, misas en iglesias historicas (San Pedro Claver, Santo Domingo, Catedral). Jueves Santo 25 mar, Viernes Santo 26 mar, Domingo de Resurreccion 28 mar.
description_en: Holy Week experienced with fervor in the walled city. Solemn processions through colonial streets, Stations of the Cross, masses in historic churches. Holy Thursday Mar 25, Good Friday Mar 26, Easter Sunday Mar 28.
